commonProblems.h2: Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity's 8A80 V8 and 6G74 V6 petrol engines are refined but complex JDM units. Valve servomotor failure on the V8 and EVAP system faults on the V6 dominate UK replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: Valve Servomotor Failure - Why Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 8A80 V8 Engines Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 4.5L V8, S33A, S43A, Gen2 (1999-2016, 8A80)
problems.rootCause: Camshaft adjustment servomotor wears internally, causing timing errors, power loss and check engine lights.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty valve timing servomotor unit, reset ECU adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early before camshaft damage; 20k-40k mile expectancy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder heads, inspect/replace camshafts, new servomotor, timing reset
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses secondary damage; suitable for moderate wear cases

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 8A80 with upgraded servomotor components, bench tested, 12‑month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage or severely damaged units; restored reliability

problems.recommendation: On a Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity worth £8,000-£15,000, a rebuilt 8A80 at £4,000-£7,200 often represents better long-term value than repeated camshaft repairs. We recommend replacement if metal debris is found in oil or mileage exceeds 75k.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 8A80 engine prices for your Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity

problems.h4: Charcoal Canister/EVAP Failure - Why Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 6G74 V6 Engines Trigger P0441
problems.affectedModels: Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 3.5L V6, S32A, S43A, Gen2 (1999-2016, 6G74)
problems.rootCause: EVAP charcoal canister saturates or cracks with age, causing fuel vapour leaks, rough idle and emissions faults.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace charcoal canister, purge valve, reset fault codes
repairOptions.longevity: Effective for isolated EVAP faults; 30k-50k mile expectancy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Canister, lines, pressure sensor replacement, fuel system clean
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses multiple EVAP components; suitable for recurring faults

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 6G74 with updated EVAP components, bench tested, 12‑month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if injector damage or internal contamination suspected

problems.recommendation: For Proudia Dignity V6 models under 90k miles with isolated P0441 codes, canister replacement is cost-effective. If misfires or fuel trim issues accompany the fault, consider a rebuilt 6G74 for long-term peace of mind.
problems.cta: Get quotes for 6G74 Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity engine replacement

problems.h4: Fuel Injector Failure - Why Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity Engines Misfire at High Mileage
problems.rootCause: JDM-spec injectors wear seals or clog internally, causing lean/rich conditions, rough idle and power loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean, test and reseal injectors; replace seals and filters
repairOptions.longevity: Viable for early-stage clogging; 15k-30k mile expectancy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace all injectors with JDM-spec units, fuel pressure test, ECU adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses worn injectors; suitable for confirmed injector fault codes

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 6G74/8A80 with upgraded injectors, bench tested, 12‑month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best choice if injector failure caused piston/cylinder damage

problems.recommendation: If diagnostic confirms injector fault without internal engine damage, replacement injectors offer good value. However, if misfires caused detonation or scoring, a rebuilt engine prevents repeat failures.
problems.cta: Compare Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity rebuilt engine prices with upgraded injectors

problems.h4: Timing Chain Tensioner Wear - Why Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 8A80 V8 Engines Rattle on Cold Start
problems.affectedModels: Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 4.5L V8, S33A, S43A, Gen2 (1999-2016, 8A80)
problems.rootCause: Hydraulic tensioner loses pressure with age, allowing chain slack, rattle and potential timing jump.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace hydraulic tensioner(s), reset timing, oil flush
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if caught before chain stretch; 25k-45k mile expectancy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioners, guides, chain; timing reset; oil system clean
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses advanced wear; suitable for audible rattle without damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 8A80 with upgraded timing components, bench tested, 12‑month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if timing jump caused valve/piston contact or high mileage

problems.recommendation: Cold-start rattle on an 8A80 V8 warrants immediate inspection. If mileage exceeds 80k or metal is found in oil, replacement with a rebuilt unit offering warranty protection is the prudent choice.
problems.cta: Get quotes for 8A80 timing chain repair or replacement for your Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity
finalCta.paragraph: The Proudia Dignity's rare 8A80 V8 and 6G74 V6 engines demand specialist knowledge. EngineMarket connects you with UK JDM import specialists who understand these complex units. Compare rebuilt engine prices with upgraded components addressing known failure points, backed by a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide supply & fit. Avoid costly dealer pricing and get back on the road with confidence.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity production timeline, organised so JDM import owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: Launch year for both Proudia and Dignity flagships, introducing the unique 8A80 V8 and shared 6G74 V6 to the JDM luxury segment.
keyChanges: Mitsubishi Proudia and Dignity flagship sedans launched in Japan
Introduction of chassis codes S32A (V6) and S33A (V8)
8A80 4.5L V8 unique to this platform; 6G74 3.5L V6 shared with Diamante
Early recall items identified: transmission mount, fuel tank, coil springs
knownFor: Exceptional build quality and luxury refinement for JDM flagship segment
Valve servomotor failures on 8A80 V8 reported from ~68k km onward
Official recalls for transmission mount, fuel tank cracking, coil spring corrosion
High collector interest today for low-mileage first-generation examples
years.cta: Get quotes for 1999-2001 Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity replacement engines
years.ticker: Proudia 8A80 V8 replacement UK • Proudia valve servomotor failure fix • Dignity 6G74 EVAP fault repair

years.description: Mid-cycle update introduced S43A chassis code with minor revisions to both V6 and V8 powertrains; recall items largely addressed.
keyChanges: Introduction of S43A chassis code for late first-generation models
Minor ECU and emissions system refinements on both 8A80 and 6G74
Recall repairs for transmission mount, fuel tank and coil springs completed on most units
knownFor: Improved reliability over earliest examples following recall resolutions
Fuel injector wear becoming apparent on high-mileage 6G74 units
8A80 timing chain tensioner wear emerging as common high-mileage concern
Strong demand today for well-maintained S43A examples among JDM collectors
years.cta: Compare Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 2001-2004 engine prices
years.ticker: Proudia S43A engine replacement • 8A80 timing chain rattle fix • 6G74 injector failure symptoms

years.description: Second-generation Proudia Dignity retained the proven 8A80 V8 and 6G74 V6 with updated emissions and electronics; JDM import interest renewed.
keyChanges: Second-generation platform launched with refreshed styling and interior
Updated ECU programming and emissions systems on both engine families
Continued use of 8A80 V8 and 6G74 V6 with minor internal refinements
knownFor: Refined evolution of first-generation engineering with improved electronics
Valve servomotor and EVAP canister issues persisting on high-mileage examples
Growing UK import market creating demand for specialist replacement support
Premium pricing for rebuilt 8A80 V8 units reflecting rarity and complexity
years.cta: Enquire about Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 2010-2016 engine availability
years.ticker: Gen2 Proudia 8A80 replacement • Dignity 6G74 EVAP repair • JDM import engine warranty UK

faq.h2: Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 8A80 V8 engine in the UK?
items.answer: Rebuilt 8A80 V8 engines for the Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity typically cost £4,000-£7,200 supply-only in the UK. Supply & fit adds £800-£1,800 depending on location and workshop.
keyPoints: Prices reflect JDM import rarity and specialist rebuild requirements
Upgraded valve servomotor components often included in rebuilt units
Warranty-backed rebuilt units offer better value than repeated repairs
Lead times apply due to limited UK stock of 8A80 cores
items.cta: Compare rebuilt 8A80 engine prices for your Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity

items.question: Is the Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 8A80 V8 engine reliable?
items.answer: The 8A80 V8 is refined but has known failure points: valve servomotor wear and timing chain tensioner issues typically emerge between 60k-85k miles on high-mileage JDM imports.
keyPoints: Regular oil changes with correct JDM-spec oil extend longevity
Valve servomotor upgrades address the most common failure mode
Rebuilt units with upgraded components offer restored reliability
Specialist diagnosis recommended before committing to repair vs replace
items.cta: Get quotes for 8A80 Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity engine replacement

items.question: Will a Mitsubishi Diamante 6G74 engine fit my Proudia Dignity?
items.answer: The 6G74 3.5L V6 appears in both Proudia Dignity and Diamante, but ECU programming, mounts and ancillaries differ - direct swap requires specialist adaptation.
keyPoints: Physical block compatibility exists but electronics and mounts vary
JDM import specialists can adapt Diamante-sourced 6G74 units
Rebuilt Proudia-specific 6G74 engines avoid adaptation complexity
Always confirm chassis code (S32A/S43A) before ordering replacement
items.cta: Compare 6G74 cross-model compatible engine prices for Proudia Dignity

items.question: Where can I buy a replacement engine for Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity in the UK?
items.answer: UK availability of Proudia Dignity engines is extremely limited; EngineMarket connects you with vetted JDM import specialists who source rebuilt 8A80 and 6G74 units with warranty.
keyPoints: General breakers rarely stock these ultra-rare JDM flagships
Rebuilt units from specialists offer warranty protection vs used imports
Supply & fit services available through our network of JDM-experienced garages
Enter your registration for tailored quotes matching your exact chassis code
items.cta: Find Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity engine suppliers through EngineMarket

items.question: What causes valve servomotor failure on Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity 8A80 engines?
items.answer: Internal wear in the camshaft adjustment servomotor causes timing errors, power loss and check engine lights, typically at 60k-85k miles on high-mileage JDM imports.
keyPoints: Failure triggers Proudia-specific diagnostic trouble codes
Early replacement prevents secondary camshaft or valve damage
Rebuilt 8A80 engines include upgraded servomotor components
Specialist diagnosis recommended to assess full extent of damage
items.cta: Get quotes for 8A80 valve servomotor repair or replacement

items.question: How long does a Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity engine last with proper maintenance?
items.answer: With regular JDM-spec oil changes and timely addressing of known issues, 6G74 V6 and 8A80 V8 engines can exceed 120k miles; many UK imports arrive with 70k-100k miles already covered.
keyPoints: Use correct viscosity oil (typically 5W-30 JDM-spec) and change intervals
Address EVAP and injector issues promptly on 6G74 V6 units
Monitor for cold-start rattle indicating 8A80 timing tensioner wear
Rebuilt engines with upgraded components restore longevity expectations
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity engine prices with warranty

items.question: Can I import a replacement 8A80 or 6G74 engine from Japan for my Proudia Dignity?
items.answer: Yes, but import costs, shipping, customs duty and VAT often make UK-sourced rebuilt units with warranty more cost-effective and lower risk for Proudia Dignity owners.
keyPoints: Import duties and VAT add 20-30% to Japanese auction purchase price
Shipping and handling risk damage to low-mileage but untested cores
UK rebuilt units include warranty, upgraded components and local support
EngineMarket specialists handle JDM sourcing if import remains preferred
items.cta: Enquire about JDM import engine sourcing for Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity

items.question: What is the Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity engine number location for ordering parts?
items.answer: The 8A80 and 6G74 engine codes are stamped on the block near the cylinder head junction; chassis code (S32A/S33A/S43A) is on the VIN plate for precise parts matching.
keyPoints: Clean the stamping area thoroughly before photographing for supplier
Provide both engine code and chassis code when requesting quotes
JDM specialists can cross-reference from registration if stamps are illegible
Incorrect code selection risks ordering incompatible ancillaries or mounts
items.cta: Get tailored quotes using your Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity registration

items.question: Does a rebuilt Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity engine come with a warranty in the UK?
items.answer: Yes - every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty from vetted UK JDM specialists, covering parts and labour.
keyPoints: Warranty terms vary slightly by supplier; confirm before ordering
Upgraded components addressing known failures often included
Supply & fit warranties cover installation workmanship as well
Keep service records to maintain warranty validity post-installation
items.cta: Compare warranty terms for rebuilt Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity engines

items.question: Should I repair or replace a failing Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity engine?
items.answer: For high-mileage Proudia Dignity units with internal damage or multiple fault codes, a rebuilt engine with warranty often represents better long-term value than repeated component repairs.
keyPoints: Minor faults like isolated EVAP canister issues may warrant repair
Metal debris in oil, timing rattle or misfire history favour replacement
Rebuilt 8A80/6G74 units include failure-point upgrades as standard
Compare total repair costs versus rebuilt engine pricing before deciding
items.cta: Get quotes for repair versus replacement for your Mitsubishi Proudia Dignity
